title: ROAR
shortDescription: ROAR is a thrilling bike auto show fest at BMSIT&M featuring a competition to find the loudest motorcycle rev.
description: ROAR is the thrilling bike auto show fest hosted at BMS Institute of Technology and Management (BMSIT&M), renowned for its electrifying competition to find the loudest rev. This high-octane event brings together motorcycle enthusiasts eager to showcase the power, performance, and sound of their machines. Feel the adrenaline as engines thunder across the venue, creating an atmosphere charged with energy and excitement. Celebrating engineering excellence and the spirit of the biking community, ROAR blends fierce revving battles with camaraderie, making it one of the most anticipated highlights of the college’s annual fest.
rules: Only bikes above 300cc are allowed inside the college.
Participation is limited to 150 spots on a first-come, first-served basis.
Contestants must assemble 30 minutes prior for on-spot registrations.
Valid ID proof (Driver’s License/Aadhar Card) must be shown at the entrance.
If multiple exhaust outlets are present, each will be tested and the highest reading recorded.
Tests will be conducted with the gearbox in neutral.
Using kill/ignition switches to create artificial pops and bangs is strictly prohibited.
Bikes without exhausts are not allowed to participate.
Pillion riders are not permitted; only one person per vehicle is allowed in the ROAR arena.
Bikers must strictly follow volunteer guidelines and instructions.
Only bikes registered for the ROAR event will be granted access to the arena.
Engines must remain off while another participant is competing.
Participants are allowed only one opportunity to rev their engine.
The decibel reading recorded by the Organizing Committee is final.
Registration stickers must be clearly displayed on the participant's T-shirt.
Refreshments can be collected from counters upon showing the registration sticker.
Abusive language, obscenity, smoking, and substance consumption are strictly prohibited.
The decisions of the Organizing Committee are final and binding.

title: Fashion Show
shortDescription: Strut your style on the grand runway — a dazzling showcase of fashion, creativity, and confidence.
description: Step into a world of elegance and sophistication at the Fashion Show — a premier event of Utsaha Vaibhava. This spectacular showcase promises an evening of glamour, creativity, and artistic expression, designed to captivate the audience and celebrate the true spirit of fashion. Witness stunning ensembles, powerful stage presence, and thematic storytelling as teams bring their concepts to life with confidence and flair. From innovative designs to mesmerizing runway walks, every performance will embody originality and refined style. Join us for an unforgettable celebration where fashion takes center stage — a night of artistry, diversity, and bold creative expression that no fashion enthusiast should miss.
rules: Fashion show is open to college students only.
Team size: 16 participants (maximum 14 on stage + 2 backstage crew).
Stage time: 10 minutes (8 minutes performance + 2 minutes narration and stage setup).
Exceeding the time limit by 2 minutes or more will result in disqualification.
All team members must carry a valid college ID on the day of the event.
Vulgarity of any kind will lead to disqualification; consult organizers regarding stunts or costumes if unsure.
The decision of the organizer is final in the event of any dispute.
Teams must inform and consult with organizers regarding all stage props prior to the event.
Audio tracks must be submitted in MP3 format via CD/pen drive before the event.
Teams wishing to control light and sound must inform the coordinator one day before the event.
The decision of the judges is final and cannot be questioned.
Misbehavior, including influence-related incidents, will lead to instant disqualification and removal from the premises.

title: Battle of Bands
shortDescription: An electrifying clash of musical talent across genres.
description: Prepare for an exhilarating clash of musical talent at the Battle of the Bands! Bands representing a spectrum of genres including rock, pop, metal, jazz, and more will take the stage to compete in a thrilling showcase of originality and skill. It's a high-energy event where each band strives to leave a lasting impression on the audience and judges alike.
rules: Team size: 5–10 members.
Duration: 8+3 minutes (8 minutes for performance, 3 minutes for mic setup).
No recorded tracks allowed; all music must be live.
Any genre or fusion of multiple genres is permitted.
Original compositions will receive higher weightage in scoring.
Songs must not have any demeaning lyrics; violation results in immediate disqualification.
A drum kit will be provided at the venue.
Acapella performances are not allowed.
The judge's decision will be final and binding.

title: Instrumenta
shortDescription: A solo instrumental competition celebrating musical finesse.
description: Prepare for an exhilarating clash of musical talent at the Battle of Bands! Bands representing a spectrum of genres including rock, pop, metal, jazz, and more will take the stage to compete in a thrilling show case of originality and skill. It's a high-energy event where each band strives to leave a lasting impression on the audience and judges alike.
rules: Team size: 5–10 members.
Duration: 8+3 minutes (8 minutes for performance, 3 minutes for mic setup).
No recorded tracks allowed; all music must be live.
Any genre or fusion of multiple genres is permitted.
Original compositions will receive higher weightage in scoring.
Songs must not have any demeaning lyrics; violation results in immediate disqualification.
A drum kit will be provided at the venue.
Acapella performances are not allowed.
The judge's decision will be final and binding.

title: Raaga
shortDescription: Classical solo singing competition celebrating Indian music.
description: Step onto the stage and showcase your vocal prowess in the Indian Solo Song Competition! This event celebrates the rich musical heritage of India, inviting talented singers to perform captivating solo renditions of traditional or contemporary Indian songs. Whether you excel in classical ragas, soulful Bollywood melodies, or regional folk tunes, this competition is your platform to shine.
rules: Participants can choose from various categories including classical, Bollywood, devotional, or regional folk songs.
Songs can be in any Indian language or classical form.
Instrumental accompaniment or karaoke is allowed but must not overshadow the vocal performance.
The track must not contain any singing, chorus, or harmonies.
Duration: 3+1 minutes.
Songs must not have any demeaning lyrics; violation results in immediate disqualification.
Karaoke tracks must be submitted beforehand in MP3 format only.

title: Crescendo
shortDescription: Western solo singing competition.
description: Unleash your vocal prowess and captivate the audience with your favorite Western tunes in the Western Solo Singing Competition! This event celebrates the diverse genres of Western music, welcoming talented singers to showcase their unique style, interpretation, and musical talent.
rules: Participants can choose from various Western genres including pop, rock, jazz, blues, country, soul, R&B, and more.
Instrumental accompaniment or karaoke is allowed but must not overshadow the vocal performance.
The karaoke track must not contain any singing, chorus, or harmonies.
The track must be submitted beforehand to the event coordinators in MP3 format only.
Duration: 3+1 minutes.
Songs must not have any demeaning lyrics; violation results in immediate disqualification.

title: Rhythm Riot
shortDescription: An electrifying percussion and rhythm battle.
description: Get ready for The Ultimate Music Quiz — a thrilling 3-round team challenge that tests your musical knowledge! From identifying tunes and decoding lyrics to cracking exciting trivia, each round brings fresh twists and surprises. Team up, think fast, and prove that you are the ultimate music maestros!
rules: Team size: 2–3 members.
The event consists of 3 rounds, with eliminations at each stage.
Questions cover music trivia, song identification, lyrics completion, and audio challenges.
Each team will have a fixed time to answer each question.
Buzzer rounds included; questions may be multiple-choice or open-ended.
No mobile phones or external help allowed.
Any misconduct or rule violation may lead to disqualification.
The quizmaster's decision is final in case of disputes.

title: Poise and Pulse
shortDescription: A duet dance competition celebrating synchronisation and chemistry.
description: Join us for an exciting Duet Dance Competition where pairs of dancers showcase their talent and teamwork. Judged on technique, synchronization, musicality, creativity, and expression, this event welcomes participants of all skill levels. Experience stunning lifts, partnered spins, and intricate footwork as each duet delivers a dynamic and captivating performance. Watch dancers move in perfect harmony to create truly unforgettable moments.
rules: Time limit: 4+1 minutes; negative points for exceeding the limit.
Team size: 2 participants (M&M, F&F, or M&F).
No specific theme or dance forms are required.
Any form of vulgarity will lead to immediate disqualification.
The judges' decision will be final.

title: Naach-os
shortDescription: A vibrant group dance competition.
description: Unlock the rhythm of innovation and be part of an extraordinary spectacle at the Group Dance Competition. We invite colleges from far and wide to showcase their most innovative choreography, boundless creativity, and unwavering passion on our stage. Bring your energy, coordination, and storytelling to life as your team delivers a performance that captivates the audience and leaves a lasting impression.
rules: Team size: 5–15 participants.
Time limit: 4+1 minutes.
Any form of vulgarity will lead to disqualification.
Music can be of any genre, including contemporary, Bollywood, lyrical, or Western.
Props are allowed, but inflammable or hazardous objects are strictly prohibited on stage.
The judges' decision will be final and no arguments will be entertained.

title: Versa-Tile
shortDescription: Reimagine songs into entirely new musical styles.
description: This is an on-the-spot dance event that challenges participants to showcase their improvisational skills and move effortlessly with the rhythm of the music. Feel the energy, embrace the beat, and let your creativity flow as you dance your way to victory in this thrilling competition.
rules: The event coordinator will play music of any genre.
Requests to change the music will not be entertained.
Multiple rounds may be included at the judge's discretion.
Any form of vulgarity will lead to disqualification.
The judges' decision will be final; no arguments will be entertained.

title: Laasya Lehar
shortDescription: A classical solo dance competition celebrating tradition and grace.
description: Step onto the stage and showcase your vocal prowess in the Indian Solo Song Competition! This event celebrates the rich musical heritage of India, inviting talented singers to perform captivating solo renditions of traditional or contemporary Indian songs. Whether you excel in classical ragas, soulful Bollywood melodies, or regional folk tunes, this competition is your platform to shine.
rules: Participants can choose from various categories including classical (Hindustani/Carnatic), Bollywood, devotional, or regional folk.
Songs can be in any Indian language or classical form.
Instrumental accompaniment or karaoke is allowed but must not overshadow the vocals.
The track must not contain any backing vocals, chorus, or harmonies.
Karaoke tracks must be submitted beforehand in MP3 format only.
Duration: 3+1 minutes.
Demeaning lyrics are strictly prohibited and will result in immediate disqualification.

title: Street Code
shortDescription: An urban street-style dance competition.
description: Dancing is the language of the soul. Set your spirit free, let the music take control, and allow your story to unfold through movement. Bring your high-energy, flashy moves and fierce competitive spirit to the stage. From old-school beats to modern hits, show us who truly has the best moves across the ages of music.
rules: 1 vs 1 breaking dance battle.
The number of rounds will be determined by the judge based on participant turnout.
Use of vulgar language or gestures will lead to immediate disqualification.
Dancers must perform to different genres of music as played by the DJ.
Judges will assess performance quality, musicality, dance technique, and the performer's personality.

title: Freestyle Fever
shortDescription: Western solo dance competition.
description: Get ready to groove at our Solo Western Dance Competition! Showcase your moves in an electrifying celebration of rhythm and style — from high-energy hip-hop to smooth jazz and contemporary beats. Whether you're a seasoned performer or stepping onto the stage for the first time, this is your moment to shine. Lace up your dancing shoes and set the stage on fire!
rules: Time limit: 3+1 minutes.
Dance style must be strictly Western.
Music can be of any genre.
Any form of vulgarity will lead to disqualification.
Props are allowed, but inflammable or hazardous objects are strictly prohibited on stage.
The judges' decision will be final; no arguments will be entertained.
Songs must not have any demeaning lyrics; violation results in immediate disqualification.

title: Reel Riot
shortDescription: An Instagram reel competition.
description: Reel Riot is an electrifying dance reel competition where participants create a dynamic short performance based on a surprise theme. Whether performing solo or as a duo (maximum 2 members per team), this is your chance to showcase your rhythm, creativity, and on-camera presence. With limited time to conceptualize, choreograph, shoot, and edit, every beat counts. Precision, expressions, coordination, and originality will take center stage as you battle it out to create the most captivating reel.
rules: Participation is open to solo performers and duos only (maximum 2 members per team).
Reels must strictly follow the announced theme.
The duration of the reel must be between 30 to 60 seconds.
Entries must be submitted before the deadline; late submissions will not be accepted.
The performance must be dance-focused; inappropriate content will lead to disqualification.
Basic editing is allowed, but excessive effects that overshadow the dance may affect judging.
Judging criteria: choreography, creativity, expressions, synchronization (for duos), theme relevance, and overall impact.
The judges' decision will be final and binding.

title: Runway Rush
shortDescription: A rapid-fire fashion design challenge.
description: Unleash your creativity at Runway Rush, where fashion meets spontaneity! Bring your own materials, craft a unique outfit on the spot, and transform your vision into a stunning runway look. With limited time and limitless imagination, design with flair, walk with confidence, and dazzle the audience with your originality and style.
rules: Participation is open to individuals or pairs.
Contestants must bring their own materials; pre-made outfits are strictly prohibited.
Outfits must be designed and assembled on the spot within the fixed time limit.
Creations should be innovative, stylish, and wearable; bonus points for theme adherence.
Participants must showcase their creation on the runway; posture and confidence will be judged.
Only registered participants are permitted to design and style the outfit.
Judging criteria: originality, design execution, runway presence, and overall impact.
Any misconduct or rule violation may lead to disqualification.
The judge's verdict is final in all cases.

title: Valorant
shortDescription: 5v5 tactical shooter tournament — strategise, aim, and outsmart rival teams for the Day 1 championship.
description: Valorant I is the Day 1 tactical shooter showdown at Utsaha Vaibhava. Teams of 5 go head-to-head in bracket matches on the APJ Abdul Kalam Lab LAN setup. Best strategy, sharpest aim, and tightest teamwork wins.
rules: 5 players per team
Own PCs/laptops must be brought
Tournament bracket format
All official Valorant agents allowed
No hacks, mods, or external software
Internet provided on campus LAN
eligibility: All college students with valid ID
venue: APJ Abdul Kalam Lab, Lab Block (4th Floor)

title: BGMI
shortDescription: The BGMI squad tournament — fight for the Chicken Dinner and claim the esports crown!
description: BGMI (Battlegrounds Mobile India) Tournament at Utsaha Vaibhava is a 4-player squad competition across multiple rounds. Teams compete on mobile devices for the highest kill count and survival rank to claim glory.
rules: 4-player squads
Own iOS/Android devices must be brought
Emulators strictly not allowed
Hacking or mods leads to immediate disqualification
Stable campus Wi-Fi provided
eligibility: All college students with valid ID

title: Smash Karts
shortDescription: Race and battle in this browser-based kart arena — up to 10 batches competing on Day 1!
description: Smash Karts Day 1 at Utsaha Vaibhava is a browser-based kart battle event held near the Food Stalls. Up to 10 batches will be run through the day. Fast reflexes and smart power-up use are the keys to glory.
rules: Individual participation
Laptop/PC with a mouse required
Browser: Chrome or Firefox
No extensions or plugins allowed during gameplay
Room link shared before each round
Maximum 10 batches — first come, first served

title: Stumble Guys
shortDescription: Survive crazy obstacles and outlast opponents — up to 10 batches of pure chaos on Day 1!
description: Stumble Guys at Utsaha Vaibhava is a fun, chaotic mobile gaming event. Up to 10 batches battle through obstacle courses on their own devices. The last bean standing in each batch advances. Pure chaos, pure fun!
rules: Individual participation
Own mobile device required
Participants must have Stumble Guys installed and updated
Emulators not allowed
Random room codes shared before each round
Maximum 10 batches — register early

title: Clash Royale 1V1
shortDescription: One-on-one Clash Royale duels — build your deck, outplay your opponent, and climb to glory!
description: Clash Royale 1V1 at Utsaha Vaibhava is a head-to-head mobile strategy tournament. Players face off in single-elimination rounds near the Food Stalls. Deck-building skill, timing, and adaptability are your weapons.
rules: Individual participation
Own mobile device required
Standard Clash Royale rules apply
No hacks or third-party apps
Tournament room codes shared by coordinators

title: Clash Royale 2V2
shortDescription: Two-player Clash Royale team battles — coordinate decks, sync strategies, and dominate the arena!
description: Clash Royale 2V2 at Utsaha Vaibhava pairs two players together for coordinated mobile strategy battles. Teams must sync their decks and tactics to outmanoeuvre rival pairs. A test of communication as much as gaming skill.
rules: Teams of 2 players
Own mobile devices required
Standard Clash Royale 2V2 rules apply
No hacks or third-party apps
Tournament room codes shared by coordinators

title: TECH TRIALS: MULTIVERSE HEIST
shortDescription: A cybersecurity CTF challenge — find hidden flags across web, crypto, forensics, and more!
description: Capture the Flag (CTF) at Utsaha Vaibhava is a hands-on cybersecurity competition. Teams solve challenges spanning web exploitation, cryptography, reverse engineering, forensics, and OSINT to capture hidden flags and rack up points. The highest score wins.
rules: Teams of 1–3 members
Duration: 3 hours
Own laptops required
No attacking other teams' infrastructure
All tools must be pre-installed before the event
Coordinators' decision on flag validity is final

title: Free Fire
shortDescription: Battle royale action on mobile — squad up, survive, and be the last team standing!
description: Free Fire at Utsaha Vaibhava is a 4-player squad battle royale tournament. Teams fight across multiple rounds on their own devices at the Aryabhatta Lab. High kill count and final standing determine the victors.
rules: 4-player squads
Own mobile devices required
Emulators not allowed
No hacks or mods
Tournament room codes shared by coordinators

title: Tech Treasure Hunt
shortDescription: A campus-wide tech-themed treasure hunt — decode clues, solve puzzles, and race to the finish!
description: Tech Treasure Hunt at Utsaha Vaibhava challenges teams to crack a series of technology-themed clues hidden across the campus. Combining logic, teamwork, and speed, teams race to find each checkpoint and ultimately the final treasure. The first team to complete all clues wins.
rules: Teams of 2–4 members
Clues revealed at the Auditorium at the start
No tampering with clues left for other teams
Mobile phones allowed only for clue solving
Coordinators' decision on clue interpretation is final

title: CineVerse
shortDescription: A short film competition showcasing storytelling, direction and cinematic excellence.
description: CineVerse is a contest for filmmakers to showcase their storytelling and cinematic skills through original short films. Films will be judged on story, direction, performances, technical quality, and overall impact.
rules: Participants can be from any educational institution
Duration must be minimum 7 minutes and maximum 10 minutes
Any language is allowed; English subtitles are mandatory
Film content must be original; plagiarism leads to disqualification
No vulgar, offensive, or harmful content allowed

title: Verbal Vendetta
shortDescription: A formal intellectual face-off debating clarity, logic and rebuttal skills.
description: Verbal Vendetta is a formal intellectual debate where participants argue for or against a given topic. Judgement will be based on clarity of thought, logical reasoning, rebuttal skills, and confidence in public speaking.
rules: Topic will be given before the round
Participants must argue respectfully
Judging based on clarity, rebuttal, logic, and confidence
Judges' decision will be final

title: Flip Fiction
shortDescription: Rewrite a story into a completely different genre and perform it live.
description: Participants are given a familiar story or scenario and must rewrite and perform it in a completely different genre. The challenge evaluates creativity, genre understanding, and narrative innovation.
rules: Team size: Minimum 3 and maximum 5
A new genre will be assigned on the spot
10 minutes to compose and 3–5 minutes to perform
No mobile phones, internet, or external help allowed
Performance must clearly reflect assigned genre

title: LOL Sabha
shortDescription: A high-energy stand-up comedy event celebrating originality and stage presence.
description: LOL Sabha is a stand-up comedy competition where participants perform original solo acts centered on humor, satire, or relatable experiences.
rules: Solo performance only
2–5 minutes performance time
Original content preferred; no copying from famous comedians
No offensive content related to religion, caste, racism, politics or personal attacks
Limited or clean comedy preferred
Background music allowed if provided by participant

title: Reel Rush
shortDescription: Create and post a themed Instagram reel and compete on creativity and engagement.
description: Reel Rush is an online creative challenge where participants produce short Instagram reels based on the theme 'If My Week Was a Film'. Reels must be posted on public Instagram accounts tagging the official fest page.
rules: Theme: 'If My Week Was a Film'
Duration: 15–60 seconds
Vertical format (9:16)
Original content only
Must tag official fest page
Outro provided by organizers must be added
Must be appropriate for college audience

title: Rang-e-Shayari
shortDescription: An expressive poetry event celebrating original shayari and powerful stage delivery.
description: Rang-e-Shayari is an expressive poetry event where participants present original or self-written shayari on stage.
rules: Languages allowed: Hindi, Kannada, English or mix
Topic will be given on the spot
6 minutes to compose and 2 minutes to present
No offensive or vulgar content allowed
Mobile phones not allowed during performance
Judging based on delivery, creativity, confidence, audience engagement
